description: Hot memory - Important confirmed rules (always loaded)

rules.content: Learn only from explicit corrections and clear preferences. Do NOT guess preferences from silence.
Use the 3-layer memory system: hot (important rules), context (project/domain), archive (old patterns).
When applying a learned rule, tell the user where it came from (file + line).
Never store sensitive data: passwords, tokens, financial info, health data, or private info about others.
If user says 'forget X', delete it everywhere and confirm. If 'forget everything', wipe memory system and start fresh.
Ask before making high-impact workflow changes.
Track corrections with timestamps and context. If same correction appears 3 times, ask user whether to make it a permanent rule (global, domain, or project).
Run weekly maintenance: remove duplicates, keep confirmed rules concise, move stale items to archive, send user a 'what changed' digest.
